title: Blocktracker
description: Track your items! Scans your entire inventory, including Shulker Box and Ender Chest contents.
body:
![BlockTracker Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db6e1298ca6f70a9cabd13844a252dbbd15a30e4_0.webp)


**A powerful utility mod for efficient resource management and project tracking in Minecraft.**

***

## BlockTracker Advantages

### Core Features

- **Block-Based To-Do Lists:** Define resource goals with target amounts using the newly redesigned **in-game GUI**.
- **Folder & Profile System:** No more chaos! Organize your projects using **folders** (Main, Farming, Redstone, Building, Misc). You can create and save multiple lists (profiles) within each folder.
- **Import & Export:** Easily share your configurations! This is **perfect for creators** making tutorials on specific farms or builds. You can simply export the material list and share it with your viewers to import.
- **Persistent Tracking:** The task list and progress are **automatically saved** and persist across game sessions.

### Killer Feature: Smart Inventory Tracking

- **Comprehensive Scan:** BlockTracker tracks progress by **scanning the entire player inventory** and **reading the contents of Shulker Boxes** held within that inventory.
- **Ender Chest Support:** It also reads items inside your **Ender Chest** (and even **Shulker Boxes stored inside it**), so you don't have to take everything out to see your progress!
- **Smart Progress Bars:** In the GUI, you can now instantly see where your items are located: A **green bar** represents the inventory, while a **purple bar** shows the share inside the Ender Chest.
- **Automatic Update:** Tasks are **automatically marked as complete** as soon as the required items are collected.

---

![Gui Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24ad722881460ff1121f9b187c1fd52a723b97e7_0.webp)

---

### Interface & Control

- **HUD Editor:** Total freedom! You can now freely **move, scale, and align** (left/right) the overlay to perfectly fit your screen.
- **New Themes:** Customize the look of your manager! Choose between **Clipboard**, **Dark**, and **Transparent** themes to suit your preference.

---

![BlockTracker Themes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71bd2766821dca4e010875f5756ae31176974df5.png)

---

- **Toggleable HUD Overlay:** A minimalist overlay displays **actively tracked items** and current progress.
  - The overlay can be toggled on or off with a keybind (default: **H**).
- **Management GUI:** Access the task manager via keybind (default: **B**) to add, remove, or reset goals.
- **Visual Confirmation:** Completed tasks show clear feedback (Green Checkmark/Text).

---

![BlockTracker Overlay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77db0fe9584f255430f65461280fc97dc097d010_0.webp)



---

## Technical Details

| Detail | Status |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Mod Loader** | **Fabric** |
| **Game Versions** | **1.21.8, 1.21.10, 1.21.11** |
| **Type** | Client-Side Only |
| **Dependency** | None |

***

## Usage

- **Open Manager:** Press **B** (default).
- **Toggle Overlay:** Press **H** (default).

---
